text: Thank you. Thank you very much. It's an honor to be voting. It's an honor to be in this great area, which I know so well. And we're going to make three stops today, big ones, big rallies, three big ones. Crowds have never been—I don't think there's ever been anything like this. This tremendous spirit. I hear we're doing very well in Florida, and we're doing very well. I hear every every place else. Who did you vote for today? I voted for a guy named Trump. Thank you very much, everybody. All right, thank you. Let's go.
